name: DOUTOR NICHIRES Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: DOUTOR NICHIRES Holdings Co., Ltd. manages restaurants and cafes in Japan. It manufactures and sells bread and pastry products; roasts and sells coffee; and imports, exports, purchases, and sells food products. The company also engages in the manufacture and wholesale of confectionary products; operation of bakery shops; wholesale of coffee machines, etc.; wholesale of fruits and vegetables; processing and wholesale of meat; manufacture of hams, sausages, and bacons; manufacture and wholesale of dressing products; and import of coffee beans and tea. In addition, it designs, constructs, maintains, and cleans stores; and operates natural food stores. DOUTOR NICHIRES Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
